title: Starway
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Starway-TF.png|thumb|right|250px|Transports ''Starway'' fleeing Cruiser [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']].]]
'''Starway''' was group of two [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Transports]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''Starway 1 & 2'' were a part of two other groups of starships attempting to flee Calamari Cruiser [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']] before it succumbed to wounds dealt by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Aftermath of Hoth]].

{{Ship-stub}}
